portfolio.title: PROJECTS WE'RE PROUD OF
portfolio.sub: A selection of recent work. Every piece tells a story.

about.title: CRAFTSMANSHIP YOU CAN TRUST
about.body1: Mosko Wood was founded with one belief: quality woodwork should be accessible to every home. With over a decade of hands-on experience, we combine traditional joinery techniques with modern design sensibilities.
about.body2: Every piece we create is built to last — and to tell a story. From the first sketch to the final finish, we're with you every step of the way.

items.name: Yael Cohen
items.text: The kitchen cabinets Mosko Wood built for us are absolutely stunning. Perfect craftsmanship, delivered on time and within budget.

items.name: Avi Levi
items.text: I commissioned a custom dining table and it became the centerpiece of our home. The quality is incredible — highly recommended.

items.name: Dana Shapiro
items.text: Professional from start to finish. The wardrobe they designed fits perfectly and the attention to detail is exceptional.
